section_label_contiguity: OK · §02 → §05 contiguous after §05 Updates Shipped + §06 Progress deletions per recent change note

findings.issue: Hero subhead opens with 'One support tool for everyone — replaced Freshdesk' — the 'for everyone' phrasing reads softly; Apex hero formula prefers number-first.
findings.fix: Reorder to lead with the number: '₹55L/year saved · 100% adoption in 2 weeks · replaced Freshdesk. Single helpdesk for 2,000+ Impetus users; AI suggests resolutions that update after every customer reply.'

findings.issue: Section is labelled '05 · Screenshots' which makes the contiguous run §02 · §03 · §04 · §05 — but the page is missing §01 entirely (the 'For:' audience block was absorbed into hero per template §3.2). Either re-tag screenshots as §05 explicitly or note the §01 absorption in the spec.
findings.fix: Either renumber screenshots to '04 · Screenshots' if §04 collapses into hero too (no — §04 is What Improved), or add a one-word eyebrow re-purpose. Cleanest: keep §02→§05 numbering and confirm spec §3.2 (drop heading if PDF section missing) is the recorded override. No code change needed; document in spec.

findings.issue: Improved-callout body mixes bold inline tags ('Everyone', 'Support agents', 'The organisation') in an essay-paragraph form. The Apex register prefers checkmark bullet list per spec §3.1 ('Each line starts with ✓').
findings.fix: Convert the dense paragraph to a 3-bullet checkmark list: '✓ Everyone · one place for support, no tool-switching. ✓ Support agents · AI-suggested solutions refresh with every message. ✓ The organisation · ~₹55L/year saved by retiring Freshdesk; 100% adoption in 2 weeks; TAT cut 40-60%.'

findings.issue: 'L1 capacity effectively expands ~2x without hiring' is a derivation, not a number from the source PDF. Source supports cost saving + TAT reduction; the 2x extrapolation has no source line.
findings.fix: Either drop the 2x clause or attribute it: 'Implies first-touch capacity expands roughly 2x at constant headcount.' Better: cut the speculation; let the ₹55L + 40-60% numbers do the work.

findings.issue: Phrase 'L2 → L3 path for InstaDesk on the autonomy ladder' references the autonomy ladder but §06 Progress section was deleted. Reader cannot click through to context.
findings.fix: Either delete the autonomy-ladder reference, or convert to inline link: '... on the autonomy ladder'. Without the §06 anchor on this page, the bare reference is now hanging.

findings.issue: Audience pill 'Anyone who needs to raise or manage support tickets' is filler — 'Anyone' overlaps with the prior 2,000+ pill.
findings.fix: Drop the 'Anyone…' pill; the first pill (2,000+ users — buyers, ops, sourcing) plus Suppliers and Store Teams already cover the audience.

findings.issue: Chip 'Support TAT cut 40-60% (Q1)' uses 'TAT' acronym. Per tone-of-voice §7 jargon table, plain English ('resolution time') reads cleaner for Apex; though the §04 callout already expands as 'Turnaround Time'. Inconsistent register: chip jargon, callout plain.
findings.fix: Change chip to 'Resolution time cut 40-60% (Q1)' so the chip and callout match.

findings.issue: <title> tag is 'Support Platform · Impetus' but the data file slug + breadcrumb labels InstaDesk. Inconsistent with the eyebrow line 'IMPETUS · INSTADESK · LIVE' which preserves the brand name.
findings.fix: Acceptable per recent change note (module names simplified). Confirm intentional; if so no action. If not, restore '<title>InstaDesk · Impetus</title>'.

findings.issue: Image alt text contains markdown asterisks: 'alt="**Support ticket detail** · ..."'. Asterisks render literally for screen readers.
findings.fix: Strip the ** from alt attributes; the visible caption already carries the bold. e.g. 'alt="Support ticket detail · Ticket history, status, contact info for issue tracking."'

strengths: Source traceability is excellent — every claim (2,000+ users, 100% in 2 weeks, ~₹55L, 40-60% TAT, AI for ASN/AWB/Fit/PP/DPR) traces verbatim to PDF p. 101.
Honesty register is clean — single Live pill, no overclaims, the acquisition-price ₹55L is from Compendium not invented.
Image asset hygiene is clean — all 4 -v2/-v2-b URLs return 200; lightbox working (verified open:true via Chrome DevTools).
Page chrome complete — nav mega-menu, crumb, footer copyright, auth.js script, Tailwind + style.css all present.
Cross-page consistency strong — /impetus/index.html card 15 says 'Replaced Freshdesk · ₹55L/year saved' which matches; home page makes no stale claim.

verification_notes.image_loads_200: verified · 4/4 images returned 200 in audit-grpE-instadesk context
verification_notes.console_clean: only standard Tailwind CDN dev warning
verification_notes.section_label_run: §02 · §03 · §04 · §05 contiguous after §05 Updates Shipped + §06 Progress deletions
